sites.name: CEO Office / Executive Lounge
sites.attack_strategy_summary: Open the CEO wall with Thermite while Thatcher clears anti-breach. Sledge plays vertical from above to force defenders off the site. Nomad covers flanks from spiral and back stairs. Iana drones out remaining defenders before the execute.
sites.defense_strategy_summary: Reinforce CEO wall and electrify with Kaid from the floor below or behind a shield. Smoke holds doorways and denies plant attempts. Mute covers drone holes and reinforced walls. Vigil roams to waste attacker time. Valkyrie places cameras in key hallw

sites.name: Open Area / Staff Room
sites.attack_strategy_summary: Hibana opens the reinforced wall between open area and teller side. Capitao uses fire bolts to deny anchor positions. Zofia clears utility and opens rotations. Ash pushes from lobby. Flores drones and destroys defender gadgets.
sites.defense_strategy_summary: Bandit tricking on the reinforced wall is critical. Maestro places Evil Eyes to deny plant and provide intel. Jager's ADS protect against flashbangs and projectiles. Alibi roams basement and lobby to slow the push. Thunderbird provides healing in hig

sites.name: Teller's Office / Archives
sites.attack_strategy_summary: Ace opens the reinforced wall from the lobby side. Twitch drone clears gadgets before breach. Sledge opens the floor above for vertical pressure on archives. Nomad watches lobby and main stairs. Dokkaebi calls phones to reveal anchor positions.
sites.defense_strategy_summary: Bandit trick the teller wall. Lesion mines cover all entry points for early warning. Jager ADS protect the site from projectiles. Pulse plays below to give vertical intel and C4. Aruni gates on critical doorways to slow the push.

sites.name: Lockers / CCTV Room
sites.attack_strategy_summary: Open the server wall with Thermite. Buck plays vertical from above to open the floor over CCTV. Gridlock covers flanks with trax. Lion scans to catch rotating defenders. Control garage and tunnel for a clean execute.
sites.defense_strategy_summary: Mira window on the wall between server and lockers for intel. Smoke denies tunnel push and plant. Mozzie captures attacker drones for counter-intel. Ela roams topside to waste time. Castle barricades slow pushes through server stairs.

attack.name: Thatcher
attack.reason: Removes all electronic denial on reinforced walls — without him, hard breachers struggle to open CEO and basement walls.

attack.name: Maverick
attack.reason: Can silently open reinforced walls without any counter. Eliminates Bandit/Kaid tricking entirely.

defense.name: Mira
defense.reason: Black Mirrors on key walls give defenders massive intel advantage and deny safe pushes on multiple sites.

defense.name: Valkyrie
defense.reason: Hidden cameras throughout Bank's tight hallways provide too much roamer intel and C4 kills.

sites.name: Armory Lockers / Archives

sites.defense_strategy_summary: Kaid electrifies the Armory wall from behind cover inside the site. Smoke holds the Archives doorway and denies late-round plant attempts. Mute jammers support anti-breach on the wall and deny drone intel. Vigil roams offices and east balcony to wast

sites.name: Workshop / Ventilation Room
sites.attack_strategy_summary: Hibana opens the Workshop reinforced wall from the parking lot side. Ash pushes through the main entrance after clearing utility. Buck plays vertical from above Ventilation to deny anchor positions below. Zofia concusses and opens rotations through s
sites.defense_strategy_summary: Bandit tricks the Workshop wall to deny Hibana every round. Smoke holds the supply corridor and denies late-round plant attempts. Jager ADS protect anchor positions from flashbangs and projectiles. Ela roams main lobby and central stairs with Grzmot

sites.name: Customs Inspection / Supply Room
sites.attack_strategy_summary: Ace opens the Customs reinforced wall from the exterior. Twitch drone clears electronics before breach. Sledge plays vertical from above Supply Room through the soft floor. Gridlock trax cover the central stairs rotation to prevent flanks. Lion scans
sites.defense_strategy_summary: Mira places a Black Mirror on the wall between Customs and Supply for intel on the exterior push. Smoke holds the passport check corridor and denies plant. Mozzie captures attacker drones for counter-intel in supply corridors. Alibi roams main lobby

sites.name: Bathroom / Tellers
sites.attack_strategy_summary: Thermite opens the Tellers reinforced wall from the east balcony side. Buck plays vertical from 2F by opening the floor above Bathroom to deny anchor positions. Iana drones out the site before the final push. Nomad covers flanks from main stairs and
sites.defense_strategy_summary: Kaid electrifies the Tellers wall from behind the counter. Lesion mines cover all entry points for early warning on pushes. Jager ADS protect the site from flashbangs and projectiles. Valkyrie cameras in offices and east balcony provide early rotatio

attack.name: Thatcher
attack.reason: Border's reinforced walls on Workshop and Armory are heavily electrified. Without Thatcher, attackers must rely on slow Kali or Twitch plays to clear Bandit and Kaid.

attack.name: Ace
attack.reason: S.E.L.M.A charges can open multiple walls from safety. Removing Ace forces attackers into riskier Thermite plays on Border's exposed wall positions.

defense.name: Mira
defense.reason: Black Mirrors on Workshop connector and Customs walls give defenders overwhelming intel and deny safe entry through Border's tight corridors.

defense.name: Valkyrie
defense.reason: Border's many exterior windows and rooftop approaches make Valkyrie's outside cameras devastating for early warning and C4 runout kills.

sites.name: Master Bedroom / Office

sites.defense_strategy_summary: Kaid electrifies the Master Bedroom wall from the bathroom side. Smoke holds the hallway and denies plant at the doorway. Jager ADS protect the balcony windows and Office angles. Vigil roams library and main stairs to waste time. Melusi banshees slow

sites.name: Bar / Gaming Room
sites.attack_strategy_summary: Thermite opens the Bar reinforced wall from the campfire side. Buck plays vertical from Master Bedroom above to pressure Gaming Room anchors. Capitao fire bolts deny the bar counter position during execute. Iana drones Gaming Room and connector befor
sites.defense_strategy_summary: Bandit tricks the Bar wall to deny Thermite. Maestro Evil Eyes cover the Gaming Room plant spot and campfire window angle. Jager ADS protect against Capitao bolts and grenades. Ela roams trophy room and main stairs with Grzmot mines. Thunderbird Kona

sites.name: Kitchen / Dining Room
sites.attack_strategy_summary: Ace opens the Kitchen reinforced wall from the campfire side. Sledge plays vertical from Office above to pressure Dining Room anchors through the soft floor. Zofia clears utility and opens soft walls for angles into Kitchen. Nomad watches back stairs
sites.defense_strategy_summary: Mira places a Black Mirror between Kitchen and Dining Room for intel on the campfire push. Smoke holds the connector and denies plant. Jager ADS protect the Mira window and Kitchen anchors from projectiles. Vigil roams above site to deny vertical set

sites.name: Wine Cellar / Snowmobile Garage
sites.attack_strategy_summary: Thermite opens the Snowmobile Garage wall from the exterior. Buck plays vertical from Kitchen floor above to open the ceiling over Wine Cellar and deny anchor positions. Gridlock trax deny the wine cellar stairs rotation and back stairs flank. Lion s
sites.defense_strategy_summary: Bandit tricks the Snowmobile Garage wall every round to deny Thermite. Smoke holds the basement corridor and wine cellar stairs, denying plant in the last 30 seconds. Mute jammers support Bandit on the wall and deny drone intel. Pulse plays on 1F for

attack.name: Buck
attack.reason: Vertical play from above is the primary attack strategy on most Chalet sites. Without Buck, attackers lose their strongest pressure tool.

attack.name: Sledge
attack.reason: Chalet's extensive soft floors make Sledge's vertical destruction devastating. Banning him alongside Buck cripples vertical play entirely.

defense.name: Bandit
defense.reason: Wine Cellar and Snowmobile Garage walls require Bandit tricking to hold. His batteries are essential for basement site defense.

defense.name: Valkyrie
defense.reason: Chalet's many exterior approaches and balconies make Valkyrie's outside cameras invaluable for early warning and C4 kills.

sites.name: Cash Room / CCTV Room
sites.attack_strategy_summary: Thermite opens the cash room wall from construction. Maverick creates murder holes if Thermite gets denied. Sledge plays vertical from roof. Nomad watches master bedroom flank. Iana drones before the execute.
sites.defense_strategy_summary: Bandit trick the cash wall to deny Thermite. Smoke holds CCTV and denies plant. Mute covers drone entry. Vigil roams to waste time on lower floors. Wamai adds utility denial on site.

sites.name: Bar / Stock Room
sites.attack_strategy_summary: Hibana opens the stock room wall from outside. Buck plays vertical from above through master bedroom floor. Ash pushes bar from the front. Flores clears utility before execute. Thatcher EMPs anti-breach.
sites.defense_strategy_summary: Kaid electrifies stock room wall. Maestro Evil Eyes cover plant spots. Jager ADS deny projectiles. Ela roams construction and garage. Lesion provides intel on all entry points.

sites.name: Church / Arsenal
sites.attack_strategy_summary: Ace opens church wall from tunnel. Sledge plays vertical from above through bar floor. Capitao denies anchor positions during plant. Dokkaebi calls phones for intel. Control blue stairs and tunnel entrance.
sites.defense_strategy_summary: Mira window on arsenal wall for church intel. Smoke denies plant and tunnel push. Mute jammers on church wall. Vigil roams upstairs. Pulse plays below for vertical intel.

sites.name: Gym / Bedroom
sites.attack_strategy_summary: Thermite opens the gym wall from construction. Push from balcony and construction simultaneously. Zofia clears utility and opens soft walls. Ash entries from master bedroom. Nomad watches blue stairs.
sites.defense_strategy_summary: Bandit trick the gym wall. Jager and Wamai stack utility denial. Alibi roams construction side. Doc anchors bedroom with healing. Control master bedroom rotation.

attack.name: Thatcher
attack.reason: Church/Arsenal and Cash/CCTV walls are heavily electrified. Without Thatcher, hard breach becomes a coin flip.

attack.name: Sledge
attack.reason: Vertical play from above is the primary way to attack Bar and Cash. Removing Sledge weakens vertical pressure significantly.

defense.name: Kaid
defense.reason: Electroclaw range lets him deny multiple hatches and walls simultaneously. Critical for Church and Cash defense.

defense.name: Smoke
defense.reason: Area denial in Clubhouse's tight doorways makes late-round plant attempts nearly impossible.

sites.name: Hookah Lounge / Billiards Room
sites.attack_strategy_summary: No hard breach needed — the walls are soft. Ash and Zofia push from balcony and VIP. Sledge plays vertical from above. Nomad watches cool vibes and main stairs. Iana drones ahead of the push. Fast execute from multiple angles.
sites.defense_strategy_summary: Jager and Wamai stack utility denial — this site gets hit with tons of projectiles. Vigil roams VIP and penthouse to deny vertical. Valkyrie cameras outside for early warning. Melusi banshees slow balcony and VIP pushes.

sites.name: Theater / Penthouse
sites.attack_strategy_summary: Hibana opens the theater wall from VIP side. Ash pushes from hall of fame. Capitao denies anchor positions during plant. Gridlock covers rotations. Control VIP and balcony for multiple angles on site.
sites.defense_strategy_summary: Kaid electrifies the theater wall. Smoke denies plant. Jager protects site from projectiles. Ela roams VIP and hookah to slow attackers. Thunderbird provides sustain near site rotations.

sites.name: Kitchen / Service Entrance
sites.attack_strategy_summary: All soft walls — no hard breach needed. Buck plays vertical from above. Ash and Zofia push from pool and sunrise. Nomad watches flanks from blue bar side. Fast execute with Finka boost.
sites.defense_strategy_summary: Maestro Evil Eyes cover plant spots and pool entrance. Jager ADS deny projectiles. Lesion provides early warning. Vigil roams upstairs. Heavy utility stacking is key since walls are soft.

sites.name: Blue Bar / Sunrise Bar
sites.attack_strategy_summary: Push from sunrise bar and pool side simultaneously. Sledge opens the floor from above for vertical pressure. Nomad watches main lobby flanks. Dokkaebi calls phones for intel on anchors. Fast multi-directional execute.
sites.defense_strategy_summary: Smoke denies plant. Jager protects site. Valkyrie provides outside intel. Ela roams upstairs to deny vertical play. Aruni gates slow pushes from sunrise and pool.

attack.name: Iana
attack.reason: Her hologram safely gathers intel through Coastline's many windows and doors with zero risk. Top fragging potential.

attack.name: Ash
attack.reason: Fast entry through Coastline's many soft walls and windows. Her speed and utility clear make her dominant on this map.

defense.name: Maestro
defense.reason: Evil Eyes lock down Hookah, Kitchen, and Blue Bar with bulletproof intel and damage. Forces attackers to waste utility.

defense.name: Jager
defense.reason: ADS protect every window and door on Coastline. Without them, defenders get overwhelmed by grenades and flashes.

sites.name: Consul Office / Meeting Room

sites.defense_strategy_summary: Bandit denies the hard-breach on Meeting Room with electrified walls. Maestro sets Evil Eyes covering Meeting Room plant spots and the main entry corridor. Wamai ADS protect anchors from grenades. Alibi roams to delay the push; Smoke provides sustain

sites.name: Piano Room / Exposition Room
sites.attack_strategy_summary: Maverick opens the Piano Room reinforced wall while Kali clears anti-breach electronics. Zofia plays vertical from 2F to pressure Piano Room anchors through the soft floor. Ying drones the site and entries through the breach once utility is gone. Fuz
sites.defense_strategy_summary: Hold Exposition Room as the trade lane — Mozzie anchors there. Mute denies breach on Piano Room, Maestro sets Evil Eyes covering Piano Room plant spots and the main entry corridor. Jager catches grenades; Vigil cycles flanks to bait isolated entries.

sites.defense_strategy_summary: Setup is intel-first: Echo covers site entries with cameras and feeds rotation calls. Mute secures the Tellers wall, Jager covers projectile lanes. Caveira hunts info from 2F/1F connectors while Lesion anchors site. Anchor in Servers and let Tellers

attack.name: Thatcher
attack.reason: Garage wall and Consul Office reinforcements are heavily electrified. Banning Thatcher forces risky Maverick or Twitch plays to open key walls.

attack.name: Montagne
attack.reason: Consulate's long hallways and tight doorways make Montagne's shield push nearly unstoppable, especially on Lobby and Garage sites.

defense.name: Mira
defense.reason: Black Mirrors on Consul Office and Garage connector walls give defenders overwhelming intel advantage and deny safe entry.

defense.name: Echo
defense.reason: Yokai drones on Consulate's low ceilings deny plant on every site. Extremely hard to find and clear in time.

attack.name: Thatcher
attack.reason: Emerald Plains has heavy reinforcement on Admin and Gallery walls — without Thatcher, attackers can't clear Bandit and Kaid for hard breach.

attack.name: Buck
attack.reason: Vertical from above CEO and Meeting is the standard 2F exec. Banning Buck removes the cleanest vertical pressure tool.

defense.name: Mira
defense.reason: Black Mirrors on Admin/Library and Bar/Lounge walls give defenders untouchable intel — extremely hard to dislodge in tight Emerald sightlines.

defense.name: Maestro
defense.reason: Evil Eyes covering Dining and Gallery plant spots stall executes by forcing utility commitments before plant.

attack.name: Sledge
attack.reason: Favela is a vertical map — Sledge above Aunt's and Football sites is the standard pressure play. Banning him kills the floor-drop game.

attack.name: Capitao
attack.reason: Fire bolts deny anchor positions in Favela's open rooms. Removes a key area-denial threat from execute reads.

defense.name: Echo
defense.reason: Yokai drones on Favela's low ceilings deny plant attempts on every site. Hard to clear given the verticality.

defense.name: Mira
defense.reason: Black Mirrors in Football Office and Aunt's Apartment give defenders read on the standard Side Stairs push.

attack.name: Thatcher
attack.reason: Fortress's reinforced walls on Commander Office and Kitchen depend on electronics. Banning Thatcher forces hard-breach gambles.

attack.name: Buck
attack.reason: Vertical from above Hammam and Briefing is the cleanest 2F→1F pressure. Buck is the most reliable open-floor option.

defense.name: Maestro
defense.reason: Evil Eyes covering Cafeteria and Sitting Room plant spots are extremely hard to clear. Forces attackers to spend utility before plant.

defense.name: Goyo
defense.reason: Volcan shields in Fortress's narrow corridors deny rotations and create plant-denial fire walls. Hard counter to standard executes.

sites.name: Master Bedroom / Kids Room

sites.name: Fermentation Chamber / Brewery

attack.name: Sledge
attack.reason: Hereford's soft floors between Master/Catwalk and Ammo/Tractor enable vertical play. Sledge is the most reliable opener.

attack.name: Thatcher
attack.reason: Master and Kitchen reinforced walls are heavily electrified — Thatcher's EMPs are mandatory for hard breach.

defense.name: Mira
defense.reason: Black Mirrors in Master Bedroom and Brewery cover the standard attacker push lanes. Extremely hard to clear without Twitch.

defense.name: Lesion
defense.reason: Gu mines on Hereford's narrow connectors and stairwells provide constant intel and chip damage on every push.

sites.name: Master Bedroom / Closet

attack.name: Sledge
attack.reason: House is a vertical map — Sledge from 2F above Garage and Living dominates the standard exec.

attack.name: Ash
attack.reason: House's soft walls and tight rooms favor Ash's breaching round entry pressure. Banning her slows attacker tempo.

defense.name: Mira
defense.reason: Black Mirrors on Master/Trampoline and Living/Foyer walls give defenders impossible-to-counter sightlines.

defense.name: Echo

defense.reason: Yokai drones on Tower's tight site ceilings deny plants and provide constant intel during exec.

sites.attack_strategy_summary: Open the Aviator reinforced wall with Thermite while Thatcher clears electronics. Buck plays vertical from above through the roof hatch to deny anchor positions. Nomad covers flanks from study and main stairs. Iana drones out Games Room before the fi
sites.defense_strategy_summary: Bandit tricks the Aviator wall to deny hard breach. Smoke holds Games Room doorways and denies late plant attempts. Jager places ADS to protect anchor positions from projectile spam. Vigil roams study and main stairs to waste attacker time. Wamai dou

sites.name: Trophy Room / Statuary Room
sites.attack_strategy_summary: Hibana opens the Trophy reinforced wall from the balcony side. Sledge plays vertical from above to pressure Statuary anchors. Capitao fires bolts deny default anchor spots behind Trophy displays. Zofia enters from red stairs with concussions. Flores
sites.defense_strategy_summary: Kaid electrifies Trophy wall and the hatch above from safe positions. Maestro places Evil Eyes on plant spots in Statuary. Mute denies drones through key entry points. Ela roams red stairs and bathroom to delay attackers. Melusi slows pushes through

sites.name: Kitchen / Dining Room
sites.attack_strategy_summary: Ace opens the Dining Room reinforced wall from mudroom side. Buck plays vertical from 2F Trophy to destroy the Kitchen floor and deny anchors. Gridlock covers flanks with Trax on rotations from library. Dokkaebi calls phones to reveal hiding defender
sites.defense_strategy_summary: Mira places a Black Mirror on the wall between Kitchen and pantry for intel on mudroom pushes. Smoke denies plant in Dining Room doorways. Thunderbird heals anchors in high-traffic spots. Vigil roams 2F and red stairs to waste attacker time. Castle b

sites.name: Living Room / Library
sites.attack_strategy_summary: Thermite opens the Library reinforced wall from the garden side. Twitch drone clears electronics and Mira windows before breach. Sledge opens soft walls for new angles into Living Room. Nomad watches kitchen rotation and main stairs. Lion scans durin
sites.defense_strategy_summary: Mira places a Black Mirror on the Living Room wall for sightlines into main hall. Kaid electrifies the Library wall and nearby hatches. Jager protects the Mira window with ADS. Alibi roams kitchen and 2F to delay the push. Azami patches holes dynamic

attack.name: Thatcher
attack.reason: Villa's reinforced walls on Trophy and Kitchen sites rely on electronic denial. Without Thatcher, attackers must use slower alternatives to clear Bandit and Kaid setups.

attack.name: Maverick
attack.reason: Maverick silently opens reinforced walls in Statuary and Dining without any counter. Banning him removes the only uncounterable hard breach option on Villa's key walls.

defense.name: Mira
defense.reason: Black Mirrors on Aviator connector and Kitchen hallway walls give defenders dominant intel and shut down safe attacker pushes on Villa's two strongest sites.

defense.name: Maestro
defense.reason: Evil Eyes on Villa's plant spots provide bulletproof intel and chip damage. The map's open sightlines make his cameras extremely hard to clear without wasting utility.

sites.name: Cockpit / Maps Room
sites.attack_strategy_summary: Map control first: Lion and Ash clear Maps Room side while Sledge sets up vertical pressure. Sledge works the soft floors below Cockpit to control rotation paths. Once site is droned and roamers are pressured, Thatcher clears the wall and Hibana open
sites.defense_strategy_summary: Kaid denies the hard-breach on Cockpit with electrified walls. Echo covers site entries with cameras and feeds rotation calls. Aruni ADS protect anchors from grenades. Caveira roams to delay the push; Azami provides sustain or last-second plant denia

sites.name: Cafeteria / Staff Dormitory
sites.attack_strategy_summary: Sledge sets the tempo — Sledge opens floors from above to deny defender anchor positions. Thatcher clears anti-breach and Hibana opens Cafeteria on a coordinated count. Ash entries first; Lion holds the back-side angles. Crew Stairs is the back-flank
sites.defense_strategy_summary: Setup is intel-first: Echo covers site entries with cameras and feeds rotation calls. Kaid secures the Cafeteria wall, Aruni covers projectile lanes. Pulse hunts info from 2F/1F connectors while Mozzie anchors site. Bandit-trick the Cafeteria exterio

sites.name: Engine Control / Kitchen
sites.attack_strategy_summary: Zofia sets the tempo — Zofia opens floors from above to deny defender anchor positions. Thatcher clears anti-breach and Hibana opens Engine Control on a coordinated count. Ash entries first; Fuze holds the back-side angles. Sun Deck vertical pressure
sites.defense_strategy_summary: Setup is intel-first: Echo covers site entries with cameras and feeds rotation calls. Mute secures the Engine Control wall, Jager covers projectile lanes. Pulse hunts info from 2F/1F connectors while Lesion anchors site. Maestro Evil Eye in Engine Co

sites.name: Server Room / Engine Storage
sites.attack_strategy_summary: Sledge sets the tempo — Sledge plays vertical from 2F to pressure Server Room anchors through the soft floor. Thatcher clears anti-breach and Hibana opens Server Room on a coordinated count. Ash entries first; Lion holds the back-side angles. Open Bo
sites.defense_strategy_summary: Setup is intel-first: Echo covers site entries with cameras and feeds rotation calls. Kaid secures the Server Room wall, Aruni covers projectile lanes. Pulse hunts info from 2F/1F connectors while Mozzie anchors site. Reinforce Server ceiling — prima

attack.name: Sledge
attack.reason: Yacht's vertical layout (Cockpit/Maps above Engine sites) favors Sledge floor-drop play. Banning him kills vertical pressure.

attack.name: Thatcher
attack.reason: Engine Control and Cockpit reinforced walls are heavily electrified. Thatcher is mandatory for reliable hard breach.

defense.name: Mira
defense.reason: Black Mirrors in Cafeteria and Engine Control cover Yacht's central rotation paths — extremely hard to clear with limited utility.

defense.name: Lesion
defense.reason: Gu mines on Yacht's narrow stairwells and corridors waste attacker time and provide constant intel on rotations.
